/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/assets/sprites/user_sprites.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/assets/backgrounds/user_background.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/assets/scenes/scenes.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/raylib-imgui/rlImGui.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/screens/editor_screen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/screens/ui/buttons.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/screens/ui/scene_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/tinyfiledialogs/tinyfiledialogs.c.o CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vn_creator.dir/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o -o vn_creator  /opt/homebrew/lib/libraylib.dylib
